title: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions family as a Credit Analyst in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
